"In this tool training, Dean is going to show you how to use the “The Ideas Worth Doing” tool. This will help your attendees find their #1 “Idea Worth
Doing” that they can start taking action on after your event. It will help them stay accountable to themselves and move forward quicker while
simultaneously being able to add a value to each idea they have."
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Write down a handful of ideas that you have that you believe could be game‐changers in your business or life.
Write down the first action needed to move you towards that game‐changing idea.
Write down your start date of that first action.
Write down a projected value of that big idea if accomplished.
Write down who can help you reach that big idea the fastest.
Practice teaching this tool so you can share it to your group.
